name: @atlas/bridge
description: Atlas v2 Bridge — the local orchestrator daemon + CLI. `atlas-bridge pair|start|stop|status|doctor`. Node 24 runs the TypeScript sources directly (erasable syntax only).

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo 'BP3 publish step: set private:false, ensure Node SEA or tsc dist/ build, update bin to dist/. See HANDOFF-BP1.md + HANDOFF-BP3.md.' && exit 1
